title: OGZ Saudi Instagram Intelligence Playbook v4

top_5_do: Visual complexity: complex beats moderate by +28pp (86% vs 58%)
Posting day: monday beats worst day by ~17pp
top_5_avoid: Content type: video is the weakest format (62%)
Text overlays: posts WITH overlays score 79% vs 57% without
Aspect ratio: vertical_9x16 massively overindexed by weak accounts (-55pp)
Visual complexity: moderate complexity is the weakest signal (-28pp vs complex)
Hashtags: 16+ hashtags underperform — keep to 1-5 for best engagement

format.question: What format maximises engagement?
agency_rules: Best format: reel (84%) — worst: image (48%)
Best ratio: landscape_4x3 (100%)
Best combo: image + landscape_4x3 (100%, n=5)

visual.question: What visual approach drives engagement?
agency_rules: Best complexity: 'complex' (93%) — 'simple' weakest (38%)
Counter-intuitive: complex visuals (+props, characters, overlays) outperform minimalist in Saudi content
Best setting: 'retail_urban' (100%)
Weakest setting: 'beauty creator setup' (0%)

voice.question: What tone and voice signals drive engagement?
agency_rules: Best tone: 'spiritual' (100%) — avoid: 'casual' (19%)
Best register: 'professional' (96%)
Best voice combo: tone='celebratory' + register='visual_only' (100%, n=3)
Heritage beats modern by +-12% (46% vs 58%) — use heritage cues in briefs
Best dialect signal: 'saudi' (88%)
Best cultural combo: modern + saudi (90%, n=191)

caption.question: How should captions be written?
agency_rules: Optimal caption length: 60+ words (65%) — avoid 30-60 word range (58%)
Optimal hashtag count: 1-5 (60%) — 16+ tanks to 13%
Emoji: avoid (56% with vs 61% without)
Best opener: emoji_open (100%)

phrases.question: What Arabic phrases drive the highest engagement?

elite_phrases.phrase: Two key Arabic phrases: وجبة فتيات القوة
الحمد لله الذي أنعم علينا شرف خدمة ضيوف الرحمن

agency_rules: Arabic phrases: 31% avg  (264 unique) vs English: 29% (119 unique)
Best category: 'price' (50%)
Elite phrases (100%): لفترة محدودة فقط / صناعة سعودية / شارك الفرحة / نسعد بخدمتكم
Avoid: nostalgia/memory phrases score 0% consistently

occasion.question: What format and approach works best per occasion?
agency_rules: eid_al_fitr: use carousel_slide (100%, n=3)
ramadan: use image (78%, n=9)
national_day: use video (100%, n=4)
founding_day: use video (69%, n=8)
evergreen: use carousel_slide (88%, n=466)

posting_day.question: Which day of the week produces the highest engagement?

hospitality.question: What hospitality cues maximise engagement?
agency_rules: Best hospitality group: 'product_pride' (96%)

overlay.question: Should posts include text overlays, and in what language?
agency_rules: Best overlay language: 'spanish' (100%) vs 'arabic' (77%)
Has text overlay: 79% vs no overlay: 57% (lift +0.22)
Best overlay type: 'cta' (94%)

sector_dna.question: What makes each sector's content distinct?
agency_rules: F&B dominates with restaurant_indoor + product_hero + playful tone
Beauty underperforms (-23pp) — studio + informative tone — needs tone refresh
Retail sits between: blended heritage, studio setting
fashion: 72% — leads with lifestyle_integrated + outdoor + aspirational tone
healthcare_wellness: 61% — leads with lifestyle_integrated + home + informative tone
f_and_b: 58% — leads with product_hero_closeup + restaurant + playful tone
beauty_personal_care: 57% — leads with product_hero_closeup + studio + informative tone
retail_lifestyle: 39% — leads with product_hero_closeup + retail_store + informative tone
real_estate: 30% — leads with text_dominant + outdoor + informative tone

elite_vs_weak.question: What separates elite accounts from weak ones?
agency_rules: Elite does more: production_quality=professional | aspect_ratio=square_1x1 | visual_complexity=moderate
Weak does more: aspect_ratio=vertical_9x16 | register=casual | visual_complexity=simple

signals.question: What are the single biggest engagement boosters and killers?

formulas.question: What complete content formula (multi-dim) drives the highest engagement?

carousel.question: How do carousels differ from other formats? What makes them work?
agency_rules: Carousels average 66% — second only to reels
Portrait_4x5 appears in 72% of high-engagement carousels (vs landscape-leaning images)
Complex visual_complexity in carousels: 90% engagement vs 66% moderate (+24pp)
Use carousels for: product showcases, storytelling, multi-step reveals
Avoid: moderate visual complexity in carousels — it underperforms every other option

video.question: When should we use video, and what video formula works?
agency_rules: Static content beats video on EVERY tested occasion (founding_day -17pp, national_day -12pp)
Reels (short-form) outperform regular video: 81% vs 59% (-22pp for raw video)
Duration paradox: longer videos (60s+) at 82% vs short (0-15s) at 53% — depth > brevity
For video: landscape_16x9 is best (88%), NOT vertical_9x16 (63%)
Patriotic tone is uniquely powerful in video: 84% — higher than in static content
Default to static unless: brand story, occasion tribute, or product in action

posting_cadence.question: How often should accounts post, and on which days?
posting_cadence.note: Temporal data has recency bias — May 2026 dominated (261/548 obs). Use directional only.
agency_rules: Sunday is the best posting day (+4pp) — F&B rule: Sunday/Thursday/Monday
Tuesday is the worst day (-13pp) — avoid for important posts
CAVEAT: cadence × engagement data is confounded by extraction recency bias
Conservative guidance: 3-4 posts/week is the sustainable elite cadence
Post quality > post frequency — accounts posting <1/week outperform daily posters
